name: Whole Wheat Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
-----------------Cocoa Frosting-----------------
1/2 cup Butter or Regular Margarine
6 tablespoons Milk
1/4 cup Unsweetened Cocoa Powder
1 lb Confectioners' Sugar (1 Box)
1 teaspoon Vanilla Extract
Combine sugar, flour, whole wheat flour, baking soda, and salt in a mixing bowl. In a saucepan, combine butter, water, and cocoa. Bring mixture to a boil, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and pour into the flour mixture. Mix well using a wooden spoon. Blend in eggs and sour cream, mixing thoroughly. Pour batter into a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan. Bake in a preheated 375 degree F oven for 30 minutes or until cake tests done. Cool in pan on a rack. Meanwhile, prepare Cocoa Frosting by piercing the warm cake with a fork and pouring the frosting over it. Cool completely. Cut into squares.
Cocoa Frosting:
Combine butter, milk, and cocoa in a saucepan. Cook over medium heat until butter is melted and mixture is smooth. Stir in confectioners' sugar (sifted). Continue cooking over low heat until confectioners' sugar is completely dissolved. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla. Frost cake immediately.
